pr.title: 4 the Leaderboard: 11L Int6 + SmearGate + Batch Optimization (val_bpb=1.1400)

output.summary: 11L int6 model with SmearGate+BigramHash widens the MLP, shrinks batch size for more steps in 600s, and pairs SWA with AdamW+Muon WD.
techniques: Per-row int6 for attention/MLP with int8 token embeddings
SmearGate+BigramHash features, SWA, and dual AdamW+Muon weight decay
Batched sliding-window eval (stride 64) for fast verification
